description_long: This object is a rectangular mint-green box featuring a large, vibrant image of pink flowers and a partially obscured human face on its main face. The box is labeled 'FLOWER 6' in bold black text, with additional smaller text reading 'ALL YOU KNOW ABOUT FRAGRANCE' and a smaller flower image in the lower right. The floral imagery is dominated by overlapping pink petals with yellow centers, set against a background of green foliage. The box has clean, sharp edges and a smooth, matte finish, with no visible openings or handles. The overall appearance suggests a decorative or retail packaging item, possibly for a fragrance or floral product.
description: A mint-green rectangular box with bold 'FLOWER 6' text and vivid pink flower imagery, featuring a smooth, matte surface and decorative floral graphics.
description_view_0: The front view shows the main floral image with a partially obscured face, bold 'FLOWER 6' text, and a smaller flower image in the lower right.
description_view_1: The left side view displays the same main floral image and text, but the box appears narrower and the smaller flower image is not visible.
description_view_2: The back view mirrors the front, showing the large floral image, 'FLOWER 6' text, and the smaller flower image in the lower right.
description_view_3: The right side view is similar to the left, with the main floral image and text, but without the smaller flower image.
attribute_petal_arrangement: The petals are arranged in a radial, whorled configuration with overlapping layers, creating a symmetrical and dense floral display typical of composite flowers.
